highlights.text: I wrote yeserday: “Bear case tomorrow: Short-term, begins below 6453.” We lost 6453 this morning and it was a seamless less afterwards to the daily low.
Mode 2 is where we get paid because generally everyday in Mode 2 is the same: Price flushes under support, puts in my core setup (the Failed Breakdown), rallies.
Last Thursday we started the day up at 6490 around range resistance.It then went “elevator down” at 830AM to 6454.

I wrote Wednesday at 4pm: “ If we are knifing down, wait for 6454 to test then recover 6461 to try long ” We held 6454 exact at 830am Thursday, recovered 6461 (which was a Failed Breakdown key low from Tuesday), and then squeezed to 6507 by Friday morning.

Will it get bought?In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a powerful Failed Breakdown we saw last Thursday (discussed above) that set the low that lasted from Thursday into today.

post_title: First Pullback For SPX in 19 Days. Will It Get Bought? August 20th Plan
